items.title: When design and product are jammed together, then the former ends up reporting into the l…
items.title_zh: 当设计和产品混在一起时，前者最终会报告给...
items.description: https://t.co/RM41VPpSP5 When design and product are jammed together, then the former ends up reporting into the latter. Explorations get shallow and aesthetics & brand suffer. It’s generally better to have brand and product design sit…
items.description_zh: https://t.co/RM41VPpSP5 当设计和产品混在一起时，前者最终会向后者汇报。探索变得肤浅，美学和品牌受到影响。一般来说，最好将品牌和产品设计放在一起……

items.title: Yes.
items.description: Yes. PMM is a product concern. I see a lot of orgs out there combining design and product management, which I think creates all sorts of poor incentives. But product management and product marketing are a much more natural fit together. ht…
items.description_zh: 是的。 PMM 是一个产品问题。我看到很多组织将设计和产品管理结合起来，我认为这会产生各种不良的激励措施。但产品管理和产品营销是更自然的结合。呃……

items.title: They may roll their eyes..
items.description: https://t.co/2xXYdLA1tY They may roll their eyes.. and then one day they will finish a project. And that project will have 40 incomplete issues. And they will want to group them by usecase. And for some of them, they will want to create ne…
items.description_zh: https://t.co/2xXYdLA1tY 他们可能会翻白眼..然后有一天他们会完成一个项目。该项目将有 40 个未完成的问题。他们会希望按用例对它们进行分组。对于他们中的一些人来说，他们会想要创造新的……

items.title: There is a limit on human cognition.
items.title_zh: 人类的认知是有极限的。
items.description: “There is a limit on human cognition. Even if you're not reviewing everything they're doing, how much you can hold in your head at one time.” There’s a reason that at a certain scale, teams of people have a manager, and then there are mana…
items.description_zh: “人类的认知是有限度的。即使你不去回顾他们所做的每一件事，你的脑子里一次能记住多少东西。”这是有原因的，在一定规模下，团队有一个经理，然后还有法力……
